stories.title: Magic from Álvarez, not Messi, sees Argentina thro...
stories.summary: It wasn't Lionel Messi coming up with the goods, but Argentina's supporting cast stepped up after the Switzerland defense muted their captain.

stories.title: World Cup VAR review: Embolo tears -- did the Swis...
stories.summary: We look at the major incidents and explain the process in terms of both VAR protocol and the laws of the game.

stories.title: Álvarez's screamer a 'huge release' for Argentina
stories.summary: Julián Álvarez said he felt a 'huge release of emotions' after he scored his first World Cup goal for Argentina to propel his team into the semifinals against England.

stories.title: McGregor injures leg on opening kick; fight called...
stories.summary: Conor McGregor's much-anticipated UFC return lasted just 69 seconds Saturday, as he injured his right leg during his fight with Max Holloway and was forced to retire.

stories.title: Wheeler rejects ASG nod, 'disrespected' by snubs
stories.summary: Phillies ace Zack Wheeler said he declined an invitation to be added to the NL All-Star roster, adding that he felt "disrespected" by being snubbed multiple times.
